hero.headline: Give your users
hero.description: Think of it as a voice channel that only exists when someone actually needs it. When a user joins a Join to Create channel, Horizon spins up a private room. Once everyone leaves, it's gone.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to manage voice channels with ease.

items.title: Instant Voice Channels
items.description: The moment a user joins a Join to Create channel, Horizon spins up a private room in milliseconds. No waiting, no manual setup required.

items.title: Automatic Cleanup
items.description: Once everyone leaves, the channel is automatically deleted. No leftovers, no clutter. Your channel list stays clean without any intervention.

items.title: Zero Configuration
items.description: Set up a single Join to Create channel and Horizon handles the rest. No complicated configs, no permission headaches. It just works.

guildMarquee.title: Trusted by your
guildMarquee.subtitle: Used by communities of all sizes.

connect.title: Support
connect.subtitle: Get support and become part of the Horizon community.

footer.description: Horizon is the easiest way to manage voice channels on Discord. Temporary rooms that appear when needed and vanish when done.
footer.legal: All rights reserved. · Not affiliated with Discord Inc.
